description: A square graphic built on a selfie-style photograph of an adult man with short dark hair seated inside a vehicle, wearing a red and orange hooded top, looking toward the camera. A red banner across the lower portion reads WORST OF THE WORST in white capitals, with a small U.S. Customs and Border Protection seal and wordmark centered below.
notable_text: WORST OF THE WORST; U.S. Customs and Border Protection
